= COMS1XXXX =

1st year undergraduate seminars for Computer Science.

[[https://ratherforky.gitlab.io/yr1-CS-programme-content/|Old worksheets by Jess Foster]]. Many are re-used in TB2.

== TB1 ==

I re-designed all of these. Will publish them later.

== TB2 ==

I re-designed only some of these. [[https://ratherforky.gitlab.io/yr1-CS-programme-content/|The majority are Jess']].
